---
title: ""
format: 
  html:
    theme: sketchy
    logo: images/atu-logo.png
    footer: "[Statistical Computing](https://vlesligo.atu.ie)"
editor: visual
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <link rel = "shortcut icon" href = "images/atu-logo.png" />
---

<!-- ::: {style="font-size: 250%; list-style-position: outside; padding-left: 0em;"} -->

<!-- -   [Desciption of Major Quantitative Project](https://atu-2025.netlify.app/major-project.html){target="_blank"} -->

<!-- ::: -->

::::::::: columns
::::: {.column width="70%"}
::: {style="font-size: 250%; list-style-position: outside; padding-left: 0em;"}
## Course Contents
:::

::: {style="font-size: 130%; list-style-position: outside; padding-left: 0em;"}
[**Week One - Introduction to Statistical Computing**](https://atu-2025.netlify.app/week-01/#/title){target="_blank"}

[**Week Two - Statistical Inference**](https://atu-2025.netlify.app/week-02/#/title){target="_blank"}

[**Week Three - Manipulating Data**](https://atu-2025.netlify.app/week-03/#/title){target="_blank"}

[**Week Four - Getting and Cleaning Data**](https://atu-2025.netlify.app/week-04/#/title){target="_blank"}

-   [**Week Four - Getting and Cleaning Data Recording**](https://atlantictu-my.sharepoint.com/:v:/g/personal/john_keogh_associate_atu_ie/EUDU3CqRR6VGseOZU77rv7EBvDeqebAUloE-T86HxZe5HA){target="_blank"}

[**Week Five - Data Visualisation**](https://atu-2025.netlify.app/week-05/){target="_blank"}
:::
:::::

::: {.column width="1%"}
:::

:::: {.column width="29%"}
## Recordings

::: {style="font-size: 130%; list-style-position: outside; padding-left: 0em;"}
-   [Week One Summary- April 5<sup>th</sup>](https://youtu.be/rlMQnBaWprw){target="_blank"}

-   [Week Two Summary- April 12<sup>th</sup>](https://youtu.be/d5tOcWPuWI0){target="_blank"}

-   [Week Three Summary - April 26<sup>th</sup>](https://youtu.be/hWLSythOVb8){target="_blank"}

-   [Week Four Summary - May 3<sup>rd</sup>](https://youtu.be/R-q5I68DMZg){target="_blank"}

-   [Week Five Class - May 10<sup>th</sup>](https://youtu.be/Tj1Uat7IDwY){target="_blank"}

<!-- -   [Week 4 - Quiz](https://youtu.be/5MEm0D1s3FY){target="_blank"} -->

<!-- -   [Data Visualisation](https://youtu.be/yJEvsJXm7mw){target="_blank"} -->

<!-- -   [Data Viz Workshop](https://youtu.be/FbO35Y42tQE){target="_blank"} -->
:::
::::
:::::::::
